hypothesis: If pretrained on diverse molecular modalities with the described custom BPE tokenizer and hybrid Transformer–Mamba-2 encoder-decoder architecture, STR-Bamba will learn aligned, modality-agnostic molecular embeddings that yield distinct, chemically meaningful clusters, superior downstream property-prediction performance across small molecules, polymers, and electrolytes, and high-fidelity translation between molecular representations, because the joint encoder-decoder pretraining captures shared structural and semantic information across representations.
